The gate has opened, and each racer gave us a perfect
start.

From the outside, it's number twelve, Silence Suzuka,
pulling ahead and moving towards the inner rail.

The other runners hang back at a safe pace, letting Silence
Suzuka fly ahead.

Looks like she's going for the front runner strategy again
today, but will it pay off?
Whistle... Look at Suzuka go!

She's not running to win, she's running for her dreams...
That alone adds an extra sense of joy to her performance.
Wow... Suzuka!

Silence Suzuka keeps up the pace as she flies down the
backstretch.
The sound of my cleats hitting the grass...
The wind blowing in my face...
Running really is...
The best!
What's this? The lead, Silence Suzuka, is picking up the pace and pulling even farther ahead!

Silence Suzuka is already rounding the third corner! She's
ten whole lengths ahead of the second-place runner!

What a fast pace! Is she out of control, or was this the plan
all along?!
Silence Suzuka has entered the final straight!

But the rest of the pack is closing in! Will she keep her
lead?!
This scenery...
Is all mine!
Hraaaaah!
Unbelievable! Silence Suzuka has picked up speed again for the final spurt!
The rest of the pack is trying to catch up, but it's no use!
Silence Suzuka!
Silence Suzuka is in the lead!
Seriously?! She's speeding up after using all that energy?!

Running a whole race from start to finish at full speed?!
Can she even lose?!
Suzukaaa! You can do iiiit!

Only 200 meters left! Silence Suzuka will zoom right past
the finish line at this rate!

She's got this in the bag! First place goes to... Silence
Suzuka!

Our undisputed winner is Silence Suzuka! And what a win it
was! I've never seen anything like it!
